title: RSA migration: C shims for OAEP and PKCS#1v1.5 encrypt/decrypt
description:
Add wolfcrypt_rsa_encrypt/decrypt C shims to compat_shim.c for RSA encryption operations. Replaces EVP_PKEY_CTX + RSA_PKCS1_OAEP_PADDING / RSA_PKCS1_PADDING usage.

Functions to implement (guarded by #ifndef NO_RSA):
- wolfcrypt_rsa_oaep_encrypt(void* ctx, int hash_type, int mgf_hash_type, const byte* label, word32 label_len, const byte* in, word32 in_len, byte* out, word32* out_len)
  - wc_RsaPublicEncrypt_ex with WC_RSA_OAEP_PAD
- wolfcrypt_rsa_oaep_decrypt(void* ctx, int hash_type, int mgf_hash_type, const byte* label, word32 label_len, const byte* in, word32 in_len, byte* out, word32* out_len)
  - wc_RsaPrivateDecrypt_ex with WC_RSA_OAEP_PAD
- wolfcrypt_rsa_pkcs1v15_encrypt(void* ctx, const byte* in, word32 in_len, byte* out, word32* out_len)
  - wc_RsaPublicEncrypt (WC_RSA_PKCSV15_PAD)
- wolfcrypt_rsa_pkcs1v15_decrypt(void* ctx, const byte* in, word32 in_len, byte* out, word32* out_len)
  - wc_RsaPrivateDecrypt (WC_RSA_PKCSV15_PAD)

WC_RNG needed for encrypt operations — use embedded RNG from ctx (already initialized by wolfcrypt_rsa_new).

Acceptance criteria:
- OAEP encrypt + decrypt round-trip succeeds
- Wycheproof OAEP decryption vectors (from wolfssl-rs-573) pass
- PKCS#1v1.5 encrypt + decrypt round-trip succeeds
